meaning: n.漫步,闲逛,四处流浪v.闲逛,漫步,跋涉于
examples: We went for a stroll in the park.
It was too hot even for a gentle stroll.
They went for a stroll along the waterfront.
From here, a short stroll along a white-sand beach offers a good view of Hangman Island.
Left unclear: whether the same protections apply to what's in your pockets as you stroll down the street.
